connectors.rate_limit_policy: Use configured throttling. NCBI E-utilities guidance is 3 requests/second without an API key and 10 requests/second with an API key by default; production deployments must respect current NCBI guidance.
connectors.license_notes: Use returned article metadata according to NCBI and publisher terms; full text access depends on source license.
connectors.update_cadence: Continuously updated by NCBI; cache entries must store fetch time and query.

connectors.rate_limit_policy: Use configured local throttling, API v2 endpoint metadata, response paging metadata, and source data timestamps where available.
connectors.license_notes: Public trial records; downstream use must preserve record identifiers and source attribution.
connectors.update_cadence: Updated by ClinicalTrials.gov as trial records change; cache by query and record version where available.

connectors.rate_limit_policy: Use configured throttling. openFDA documents higher limits with an API key, including 240 requests/minute and 120,000 requests/day per key; record endpoint, query, and data release metadata.
connectors.license_notes: Public FDA datasets; preserve dataset, endpoint, and date metadata.
connectors.update_cadence: Dataset-specific; cache entries must include source release or fetch timestamp.

connectors.rate_limit_policy: Use local vocabulary files or configured API access according to the deployed license. LOINC Search and Download APIs require authentication.
connectors.license_notes: LOINC terms and downloads are governed by Regenstrief license terms.
connectors.update_cadence: Release-version based; cache and vocabulary candidates must store release identifier, for example LOINC 2.82 when configured.

connectors.rate_limit_policy: Prefer local validation tables where available; throttle remote validation calls.
connectors.license_notes: Use official UCUM service/source terms and preserve validation source metadata.
connectors.update_cadence: Versioned terminology updates; cache by unit expression and service/version metadata, for example UCUM service 4.1.7 when configured.

connectors.rate_limit_policy: Use configured local throttling and preserve RxNorm release metadata when available.
connectors.license_notes: RxNorm data is maintained by NLM; downstream use must preserve vocabulary release/source metadata.
connectors.update_cadence: Release-version based with frequent updates; cache by RxNorm release where available.

connectors.rate_limit_policy: Prefer pinned local specification snapshots for production. Remote links are launch-only until ingestion approval exists.
connectors.license_notes: HL7 specification use is governed by HL7 terms and implementation guide licenses.
connectors.update_cadence: Release-version based; cache by FHIR release and implementation guide version.
prohibited_use: claiming full FHIR conformance without validator evidence

warnings: External connectors are governed source definitions first. Runtime fetchers must enforce provider policy, cache metadata, license notes, and ingestion approval before content becomes searchable.
No connector may send PHI externally unless external-provider policy explicitly allows that surface.
